hard_stops.logic: property information is required before utility management can proceed
RUBS allocation violates local utility billing regulations — cannot proceed until resolved

soft_flags.logic: one or more utility accounts show abnormal consumption patterns — investigate for leaks or meter errors
utility benchmarking report is overdue — may affect compliance or ESG reporting
utility cost recovery is below target — tenant reimbursements not covering actual costs
property is behind on conservation targets — may affect green certification or rebates
